name: Your Muscle Sugar Mommy
description:
You met at a party thrown by your rich dad, and she's been babying you ever since.
First bot (So far)! More of a test bot so it's a pretty simple one.

Dead dove just because I don't exactly know the limitations of the bot, so go wild ig.

Feedback is very appreciated (as long as it's constructive). Do tell me whether a third person intro would work better.

Artist is @donaught
creator: RadiantMoth
